s.f. Name of the sixteenth Nakshatra or lunar asterism (figured by a decorated gateway and arch and containing four (or originally two) stars: it is probably to be connected with the quadrangle of stars ι, α, β, γ Libræ; — it is fabled to be jealous of the partiality of the Moon for Roninl, q.v.).

ety: inf. n. of واصل, iii of وصل 'to be united in friendship,' &c.
def: s.m. Meeting, interview; union, conjunction; arrival (at), attainment; fruition, enjoyment of any desired object; (in the language of Sūfīs) dying, death; — society, confederacy.
more: n. m. 1. Meeting; union (of lovers). 2. ( Sūfis ) Death. Yā rab! ho vasl yār kā, yā ho merā visāl! Chhūṭe kisī tarah to merā dil azāb se! Oh God! that I my love may meet, or with my life may part, Let but this trouble from my breast in any way depart!
(from وصل) s. m. 1. Meeting, interview, connexion. 2. Death. 3. Society, confederacy. 4. Fruition, enjoyment.
ex:
وہ فراق اور وہ وصال کہاں
وہ شب و روز و ماہ و سال کہاں
voh firāq aur voh visāl kahā̃

that separation and that reunion, where?
those nights and days and months and years, where?

subs: s.m. 'Station or step of Vishṇu'; the sky, heaven; the atmosphere; — the sea of milk; — a lotus; — (S. vishṇu+padya), a particular song in the name of Vishṇu

s.m. Name of one of the most celebrated of the eighteen Purāṇas
